name: Southwestern Energy Company
description: Southwestern Energy Company was a prominent independent natural gas exploration and production company formerly headquartered in Spring, Texas. The company focused on the acquisition, development, and production of natural gas and oil properties, primarily within the United States. In October 2024, Southwestern Energy completed a merger with Chesapeake Energy, resulting in the formation of a new entity known as Expand Energy Corporation. As a result of this strategic combination, Southwestern Energy ceased to exist as an independent publicly traded company, with its operations now integrated into the broader portfolio of Expand Energy.
